name: Changjiang Securities Company Limited
summary: Changjiang Securities Company Limited operates as a securities company in China. The company provides securities brokerage, investment banking, and asset management services. It also engages in the fixed income, securities derivatives, fund management, futures, and direct investment businesses. The company was formerly known as Hubei Securities Company. Changjiang Securities Company Limited was founded in 1991 and is headquartered in Wuhan, China.
